title: The Podcast Trick That Got Me to the Gym

content.setup: I discovered this true crime podcast I was OBSESSED with. Like, I'd stay up too late listening obsessed. At the same time, I was failing miserably at going to the gym.
content.development: Then I made a rule: I could ONLY listen to this podcast at the gym. Nowhere else. Not in the car. Not at home. Only on the treadmill.
content.turning_point: Suddenly I was EXCITED to go to the gym. Not for the exercise - for the podcast. I'd find myself wanting to go longer just to hear what happened next. I bundled something I needed to do with something I wanted to do.
content.lesson: This is called temptation bundling. You pair a behavior you need to do (gym) with a behavior you want to do (podcast). Your brain starts associating the hard thing with pleasure.
content.application: What do you love that you could bundle with something you're avoiding? Audiobooks + cleaning? Favorite show + treadmill? The combination can be powerful.
